_comment: Example payloads for testing the Proposal Auto-Generator Platform API

institutionProfile.name: Sri Venkateswara College of Engineering
institutionProfile.vision: To be a globally recognized institution producing industry-ready, ethically grounded engineers.
institutionProfile.mission: To provide excellence in technical education through innovative pedagogy, research, and strong industry-academia partnerships.

gapAnalysis.title: Lack of Practical AI/ML Exposure Among Final Year Students
gapAnalysis.description: Final-year students demonstrate significant theoretical knowledge in artificial intelligence and machine learning but lack hands-on implementation skills in real-world datasets, model deployment, and production-grade ML pipelines.
gapAnalysis.estimatedImpact: Directly affects campus placement outcomes with 60% of students failing technical rounds in AI-focused companies.

gapAnalysis.title: Outdated Curriculum in Cloud Computing and DevOps Practices
gapAnalysis.description: The existing curriculum on cloud computing covers only foundational AWS concepts from 2019. Modern cloud-native architectures, containerization (Docker/Kubernetes), CI/CD pipelines, and serverless computing are entirely absent.
gapAnalysis.estimatedImpact: Reduces industry readiness and limits student eligibility for cloud-focused internship and job roles.

gapAnalysis.title: Insufficient Industry-Academic Collaboration in Research Projects
gapAnalysis.description: Research projects undertaken by students are largely academically oriented with minimal industry problem statements. Industry partners are not engaged in project mentorship, funding, or real-world validation.
gapAnalysis.estimatedImpact: Results in low research publication quality and poor alignment with industry innovation requirements.

gapAnalysis.title: Inadequate Laboratory Infrastructure for Embedded Systems Development
gapAnalysis.description: The embedded systems laboratory lacks modern microcontrollers (STM32, ESP32), RTOS development tools, FPGA boards, and industry-standard simulation software, limiting practical exposure.
gapAnalysis.estimatedImpact: Prevents students from developing embedded product prototypes aligned with IoT industry standards.

gapAnalysis.title: Limited Soft Skills and Professional Communication Training
gapAnalysis.description: Students demonstrate weak professional communication skills including technical writing, presentation delivery, team collaboration, and cross-functional communication, which are increasingly required by employers.
gapAnalysis.estimatedImpact: Estimated 30% placement rejection due to soft skill deficiencies in HR rounds.

institutionProfile.name: Madurai Kamaraj University – Department of Technology
institutionProfile.mission: To advance knowledge through research, teaching, and community engagement.

gapAnalysis.title: Zero Real-World Industry Exposure for Postgraduate Students
gapAnalysis.description: Postgraduate students complete their degrees with no structured industry exposure, resulting in a significant gap between academic theory and workplace expectations.
gapAnalysis.estimatedImpact: Over 75% of PG graduates remain unemployed for 6+ months post-graduation due to lack of practical experience.

gapAnalysis.title: Absence of Data Science and Analytics Competency
gapAnalysis.description: Neither undergraduate nor postgraduate curricula include structured modules on data analytics, statistical modelling, or data visualization tools used by modern organizations.
gapAnalysis.estimatedImpact: Students are ineligible for data analyst and business intelligence roles across the industry.

gapAnalysis.title: Inadequate Exposure to Agile and Scrum Methodologies
gapAnalysis.description: Software development courses do not include agile frameworks, sprint planning, or project management tools such as JIRA, which are standard in all modern software companies.
gapAnalysis.estimatedImpact: Students require significant onboarding time after placement, reducing productivity and raising employer dissatisfaction.

institutionProfile.name: PSG College of Technology
institutionProfile.vision: To emerge as a global centre for technical excellence, entrepreneurship, and innovation.
institutionProfile.mission: To develop competent engineers and technologists through quality education, research, and innovation.

gapAnalysis.title: Low Innovation Culture and Student Entrepreneurship Participation
gapAnalysis.description: Despite strong academic performance, student participation in national innovation challenges, startup incubators, and technology competitions is negligible, indicating a cultural gap in applied creative problem-solving.
gapAnalysis.estimatedImpact: Institutional innovation ranking has dropped 15 positions. Alumni entrepreneurs represent less than 2% of graduates.

gapAnalysis.title: Absence of Cross-Disciplinary Project Collaboration Infrastructure
gapAnalysis.description: Students from different departments rarely collaborate on joint projects due to absence of structured frameworks, shared project spaces, or interdisciplinary faculty mentorship programs.
gapAnalysis.estimatedImpact: Limits development of complex multi-technology solutions and reduces competitiveness in national-level tech competitions.

gapAnalysis.title: Technology Transfer Gap Between Research and Industry
gapAnalysis.description: Faculty and student research outputs rarely find pathways to industry adoption or commercialization. Intellectual property awareness and technology transfer processes are not institutionalized.
gapAnalysis.estimatedImpact: Research funding from industry sources represents less than 5% of total institutional research budget.

gapAnalysis.title: Limited Exposure to Emerging Technologies: AR/VR and Blockchain
gapAnalysis.description: Neither curriculum nor extracurricular programs include structured exposure to augmented reality, virtual reality, or blockchain technologies, which are increasingly demanded by leading technology employers.
gapAnalysis.estimatedImpact: Students cannot compete for roles in Web3, metaverse, and immersive technology companies.
